rationale: Both reviews correctly identify (and would drive removal of) the same material api-design flaws grounded in the diff: vacuous IsUnipotent under geomReduced (lines 47-54), dead True-based ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup fields+lemma (lines 68-80), and partial AlgPoints. Rev2's extras (naming/simps/rebinding/redundant instance/missing characteristic lemmas) are either minor, stylistic, or premature given the roadmap placeholders; acting on them would not make the merged PR meaningfully better than following Rev1's more targeted fixes.
